# Transcrição: PLF_Case_Study_Tanya

- **Fonte:** PLF_Case_Study_Tanya
- **Duração:** 07:15
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 03:04]

Hey, I'm Tanya. I'm from the Gold Coast in Queensland, Australia, and I'm a journalist and a media and publicity coach. Three years ago, my marriage of ten years ended and I found myself living on welfare. And I built a six-figure business selling from stage. It sounds really exciting and glamorous, travelling to a new city every fortnight. The reality is, it is so exhausting. There were some mornings when I sat up, I physically retched. The impact on my health was absolutely profound. I developed adrenal fatigue, the impact on my diet. I developed early-stage insulin diabetes. I put on eight to ten kilos and a lot of people would love to be able to hop on airplanes and travel and sell from stage and live the dream. But try being in that body where you are so tired, it's really hard to think clearly and you physically, you just want to cry. You're so completely and utterly exhausted. And logistics as a single mum, travelling all the time away from my daughter was really tough. And she, I picked her up from school one day and she said to me, Mummy, I've got a new ringtone. And it was that song, I'm only one call away. And it was really hard because when you're travelling and you're a plane right away, you might be one phone call away. But if she needed me, she needed me to be there. I wasn't just one phone call away. I wasn't just a short car trip away. I was another state. To drive, I was a couple of days away. And it was heart wrenching. The turning point for me was March 2016 when I was catching a plane down to Melbourne. It was 11 o'clock at night and I had to give a two-day workshop starting at 9 o'clock in the morning. I had a three-hour flight ahead so I wasn't going to be getting into the hotel until at least two o'clock in the morning and seven hours later I was going to be on my feet, high energy delivering a premium priced live training workshop. And I was sitting on the plane and I'm waiting for takeoff and I thought to myself, Tanya, this is ridiculous. Something has got to give. I wasn't performing at that, it created, creatively wise. I wasn't performing at that top level anymore. I wasn't enjoying my training anymore because it was groundhog day. Every couple of weeks it was a new hotel in a new city. It was the same thing in and out, same content being delivered in and out and I was completely burnt out. And I thought to myself, you've got to stop this live training. You've got to be all in and you've got to go online. But I needed

## [03:04 - 06:07]

to find the person who had that magic formula. And a friend, actually a boyfriend put Jeff Walker's product launch formula in front of me and the timing couldn't have been any more perfect because what I didn't know was that Jeff was in launch mode. I hopped online and there was a little over 24 hours before the door was closed. And I ditched the boyfriend but I kept the training and I signed up for product launch formula. I started implementing Jeff's strategies and one of those strategies is called a testimonial cruncher which is absolutely gold. I actually was a little bit guilty of having a cold list. They would have been lucky to have gotten a Merry Christmas from me once a year. I sent that out and I immediately received more testimonials than I'd ever received ever in the lifespan of my business. My list also started to grow really quickly and people started talking to me from my list and they started sending me emails about how much they're enjoying my content. I was wondering if anyone would actually read any of the emails that I had sent but the more that I started to engage with my tribe and engage with my list, the more they started to write in and communicate with me which was really, really exciting. So I was sitting on the plane going down to Melbourne and I thought something's going to give and it's not going to be my health anymore. So I decided to cut the parachute and to be all in. I'd already had a really promising response from the PLF strategies I'd already implemented and I knew that as a good student if I kept following the teachings, if I kept following Jeff's teachings, I kept taking those baby steps, I kept moving that little bit forward towards my goal each day that I would get there. And so I calculated how much money I had in the bank and I stopped my live training. I started work straight away. I started scripting my PLC scripts, I booked my videographer, I booked in some case studies, some testimonials and produced some really awesome testimonials to go with my launch and then I launched. I added 355 people to my database over 14 days which doesn't sound like a lot but my list actually grew by 25% in 14 days with email open rates of between 24 and 32%. So I was super excited about that. I had students sign up in four countries and three different continents around the world and I had $27,000 in sales and I didn't even have to pack a suitcase. And what's crazy mad is that that first PLC video reached 400 people. Now to do that in live training to get my teachings to touch 400 people would

## [06:08 - 07:15]

have taken four months. That's travelling every 14 days, you've got a vent higher, you've got catering, you've got hotel accommodation, all of that. I have bypassed and of course I haven't had to leave my daughter as well. Mum's not so burnt out and I have so much more time for her. A lot of entrepreneurs want that elusive four hour work week, they want that laptop lifestyle and for me that's what PLF is truly going to afford me and enable me to do. And for her I think the future looks a lot less stressful. She sees having her mum in her life a lot more and I'm a lot closer should she need me. So now I am only one phone call away. Thank you.
